AgentGuard Dashboard

Runtime security platform for AI agents — monitor, control, and audit in real-time.

📋Audit Log

Tamper-evident audit trail with hash chain verification. Filter by agent, action, severity.

🤖Agents

Monitor and manage your AI agents. One-click kill switch with confirmation.

📜Policies

Define and deploy security policies via YAML DSL. Version history, dry-run testing.

👤HITL Queue

Review and approve pending human-in-the-loop decisions in real-time.

📊Compliance Report

Generate OWASP LLM compliance reports with policy summary and audit events. Export to PDF.

🔔Alerts

SIEM integrations, webhooks, and anomaly notifications.

Getting Started

  1. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to your AgentGuard API endpoint
  2. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENTGUARD_JWT or save your JWT via localStorage ag_token
  3. Navigate to Audit Log to see live events
  4. Navigate to Agents to manage agent kill switches
  5. New to AgentGuard? 🚀 Run the 5-minute setup wizard
